planNote: Pro plan — variables publish to Community only, not team library. Code handoff uses exported tokens in design-system/tokens/.

Primitive.purpose: Raw values — do not use directly in UI

Semantic.purpose: Meaning-based tokens (background, text, border, action, status)

Component.purpose: Component-specific tokens (button, card, nav, footer, input)

Fluid.purpose: Fluid min/max tokens for mobile (360–768) and desktop (1366–1920) clamp() interpolation

workflows.reExportTokens: Figma MCP use_figma → update design-system/tokens/tokens.json → npm run tokens:generate
workflows.codeConnect: Requires Org/Enterprise + published team library — not available on current Pro plan
